sections.paragraph:
θηριομαχίον, ου, τό (s. prec. and next entry; TAM II, 508, 12) pl. τὰ θ. (cp. Cic. Ep. 70, 20; 22 ludus bestiarius. The combat usu. pitted the condemned pers. against lions, tigers, leopards, wolves, or dogs.) fight with beasts AcPl Ha 2, 11; 36, 3 and 17.—Cp. DELG s.v. θήρ.

prec. prec. = preceding

TAM TAM = Tituli Asiae Minoris—List 3

  1. pl. = plural
  2. cp. = compare, freq. in ref. to citation fr. ancient texts

Ep.

Ep. = Epistola/Epistula, when applied to letters mostly pseudonymous; various dates—List 5

  1. = epistle

usu. usu. = usually

pers. pers. = person(s)

AcPl Ha AcPl Ha = Acts of Paul, PHamb—List 1

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 455
